blocks.content: Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Understood the value of dashboard workflows with Git Sync
- Created new dashboards in Git Sync provisioned folders
- Saved dashboards using direct commits to the main branch
- Edited existing synced dashboards
- Created pull requests for team review of dashboard changes
- Viewed and merged pull requests in GitHub
- Applied software development workflows to dashboard management

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this journey:

- [Use Git Sync to manage resources](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/git-sync-use/)
